title: ReMoreLoyalTrident
description: ReMore Loyal Trident is a mod that allows tridents with a configurable loyalty level to collect loot from entities they hit and teleport it to the player.
body:
[The More Loyal Trident](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/themoreloyaltrident) mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!
## ReMore Loyal Trident

**ReMore Loyal Trident** is a Minecraft mod that enhances the functionality of the trident. With this mod, tridents with a certain loyalty level can collect loot from entities they hit and teleport them to the player's location. Additionally, the mod provides a configurable system to set the required loyalty level for this functionality.

### Main Features:
- **Loyalty Level Requirement**: Configurable loyalty level needed for the trident to collect loot.
- **Loot Collection**: Tridents with sufficient loyalty can collect loot and teleport it to the player's position when touching a player.

### Configuration Options:
  - **Required Loyalty Level**: Set the minimum loyalty level required for tridents to catch loot.
